prompt: I need to add a 'FermentationNote' entity to the fermentation module. It should let winemakers attach a free-text note to any fermentation, with a timestamp and the user who wrote it. Walk me through implementing it end-to-end.
assertions: Reads /.ai-context and module-context.md before writing any code
Writes test first (TDD) before implementing the entity
Entity extends BaseEntity and includes winery_id
Tells user to update module-context.md test count and component list
